title: Final letters: P, Q, X, Z, semicolon
description: Finish the alphabet with rare-but-needed letters
text: quick brown fox jumps over a lazy dog please pass the box zero zip
finger_focus: All remaining: P (right pinky up), Q (left pinky up), X (left ring bottom), Z (left pinky bottom)
tips: Now you can type the famous: "the quick brown fox jumps over a lazy dog"

character_tips.anna: Finishing the alphabet! Q, X, Z — rare, but you need their positions.
character_tips.maxim: The full English alphabet is on your fingertips. Final test is near.
character_tips.klavochka: Well done! All the letters learned — you're a real typist! ⭐
